page: Google Cloud Platform c3-standard-4 is a general-purpose server configured with 4 dedicated vCPUs and 16 GB of RAM, operating on the x86_64 architecture. The system is powered by an Intel Xeon 8481C processor running at a base speed of 2.7 GHz, featuring 2 physical cores with 2 threads per core. The processor is equipped with a 105 MB L3 cache, a 2 MB L2 cache, and a 48 KB L1d cache. This instance type does not include local storage or bundled GPU hardware.

Performance benchmarks indicate average single-core capabilities paired with weaker multi-core and memory bandwidth results. The server achieved a stress-ng single-core CPU score of 1618.89 and a Geekbench single-core score of 1713.0, both of which fall into the average tier. Conversely, multi-core performance is relatively weak, as shown by a Geekbench multi-core score of 3813.0 and a stress-ng multi-core score of 3315.66. Memory bandwidth is also limited, with uncached large-block read speeds of 28.42 GB/sec and write speeds of 21.13 GB/sec.

The processor supports advanced instruction sets, including Intel Advanced Vector Extensions (AVX-512) and Advanced Matrix Extensions (AMX). These features assist with specialized tasks, reflected in an average Passmark CPU encryption score of 3506.92 and a text generation speed of 112.11 tokens/sec using a small 135M LLM model. Static web serving throughput is measured at an average of 6.68 GB/sec. Given these performance characteristics, the server is best suited for general-purpose applications, static web serving, and moderate single-threaded workloads that do not require high multi-core scaling or local storage.
description: Google Cloud Platform c3-standard-4 is a general-purpose server featuring 4 dedicated vCPUs and 16 GB of RAM on the x86_64 architecture. Powered by an Intel Xeon 8481C processor running at 2.7 GHz, it includes 2 physical cores, 2 threads per core, and a 105 MB L3 cache. The server does not feature local storage or bundled GPUs. Benchmark data shows average single-core performance, with a Geekbench single-core score of 1713.0, but weaker multi-core scaling and memory bandwidth. Supported instruction sets include AVX-512 and AMX, which assist with encryption and basic vector operations. This server is suitable for general-purpose computing, static web serving, and moderate single-threaded workloads.

tagline: A balanced x86_64 virtual server with dedicated Intel Xeon processors, optimized for moderate single-core workloads and general-purpose applications.

Intel Xeon 8481C processor running at 2.7 GHz with 105 MB L3 cache

Supports AVX-512 and Intel Advanced Matrix Extensions (AMX)
